headline: E-Z-GO Celebrates National Golf Cart Day 2026
summary: Buyers Can Receive Additional Savings on Purchases of Select E-Z-GO ModelsAugusta, Georgia--(Newsfile Corp. - June 10, 2026) - Textron E-Z-GO LLC, a Textron Inc. (NYSE: TXT) company and a leading designer and manufacturer of golf cars and utility vehicles, will celebrate National Golf Cart Day 2026 by offering additional savings on purchases of qualifying E-Z-GO models.To view an enhanced version of this graphic, please...

headline: Strength in Defense & Propulsion Unit Drives GE: Will the Momentum Last?
summary: GE Aerospace's Defense & Propulsion unit posts strong order and revenue growth, backed by major defense contracts and a robust project pipeline.
